reasons: Mathilda gives Lancelot extra mobility and shielding during his dive path.
Lancelot benefits from Mathilda's support because he can enter or exit fights with more flexible timing.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Lancelot extra mobility and shielding, helping him enter or exit while preserving burst timing.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda positions near Lancelot's intended dive route.
Lancelot coordinates dash timing instead of wasting mobility.
failureCases: Lancelot dives before Mathilda is in range.
Enemy hard control waits for the end of Lancelot's immune frames.
Mathilda's field expires before Lancelot uses it.

reasons: Angela can attach to Lancelot during dive attempts and protect him while he commits to burst.
Lancelot benefits from extra shielding and sustain when he has to enter deep enemy space.

proof.summary: Lancelot supplies the mobility burst, while Angela improves his survival during the entry and exit window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Lancelot enters deep.
Lancelot targets a hero he can realistically finish.
failureCases: Angela attaches after Lancelot has already disengaged.
Enemy anti-dive control is saved for his exit.

reasons: Floryn can support Lancelot even when he dives beyond normal support range.
Lancelot benefits from global sustain after deep burst attempts where he still needs to escape.

proof.summary: Lancelot dives into enemy space, while Floryn can still support him from distance.
worksBestWhen: Lancelot uses sustain support to exit rather than overstay.
failureCases: Lancelot is burst before global support arrives.
Lancelot dives into multiple control tools.

reasons: Selena can create vision and stun setup before Lancelot commits to a pickoff.
Lancelot can follow Selena's confirmed target with mobility burst.

proof.summary: Selena prepares the pickoff path, while Lancelot follows with mobility burst on the confirmed target.
worksBestWhen: Lancelot waits for confirmed stun or vision.
failureCases: The enemy groups tightly and peels the target.

reasons: Tigreal's grouped control can give Lancelot a safer moment to enter a teamfight.
Lancelot can follow Tigreal's crowd-control window with burst onto priority targets.

proof.summary: Tigreal starts the control sequence, while Lancelot follows into the enemy formation for burst.
worksBestWhen: Lancelot waits for Tigreal's displacement before entering.
The enemy group contains high-value damage targets.
failureCases: Tigreal engages too far from Lancelot.
Lancelot loses his reset path after the first dash.
Enemy tanks block access to the real target.
